name: README from scratch
scenario: Write a README for CLI tool 'snapenv' (Go tool for snapshotting env vars)

assertions.text: Does NOT start with 'Welcome to' or similar filler phrases
Shows actual CLI commands (snapenv save, snapenv load, snapenv list) with examples
First paragraph/sentence explains what the tool does concisely
Does not include empty or placeholder sections (e.g., '## Contributing\nTBD')
Includes how to install the tool
